title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='html,body{background:#ffffff;margin:0;padding:0;width:100%;height:100%}body::before{content:"";position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:-1;background:linear-gradient(125deg,#FF2D00,#FF9400,#FFFF00,#00FF00,#00FFFF,#0000FF,#FF00FF);background-size:1000% 1000%;animation:rainbow 15s ease infinite}@keyframes rainbow{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}.markdown-body,.FileList{background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:10px;padding:25px!important;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}.Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important}#side-panel{position:fixed;left:20px;top:20px;bottom:20px;width:240px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);border-radius:12px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:2px solid #fff;padding:15px;transition:transform 0.3s}#search-inp{width:100%;padding:10px;border:2px solid #eee;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:15px;outline:none;background:#f9f9f9}#search-inp:focus{border-color:#0072ff;background:#fff}.nav-group{font-weight:bold;margin:10px 0 5px;color:#333;font-size:14px;background:#f4f4f4;padding:5px;border-radius:5px}.nav-link{display:block;padding:6px 10px;color:#555;text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;border-bottom:1px solid #fcfcfc}.nav-link:hover{background:#0072ff;color:#fff;border-radius:4px}@media(min-width:1300px){.markdown-body,.FileList{margin-left:280px}}@media(max-width:1299px){#side-panel{transform:translateX(-120%)}#side-toggle{display:flex!important}}#side-toggle{display:none;position:fixed;left:15px;bottom:15px;width:50px;height:50px;background:#0072ff;color:#fff;border-radius:50%;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;box-shadow:0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);z-index:10000;cursor:pointer}';document.head.appendChild(s);var btn=document.createElement('div');btn.id='side-toggle';btn.innerText='☰';btn.onclick=function(){var p=document.getElementById('side-panel');p.style.transform=p.style.transform==='translateX(0px)'?'translateX(-120%)':'translateX(0px)'};document.body.appendChild(btn);window.ViewImage&&ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var p=document.createElement('div');p.id='side-panel';var inp=document.createElement('input');inp.id='search-inp';inp.placeholder='🔍 搜索...';inp.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();p.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l=>{l.style.display=l.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};p.appendChild(inp);var list=document.createElement('div');list.style.overflowY='auto';list.style.flex='1';p.appendChild(list);var map={};Object.values(d).forEach(x=>{var l=x.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!map[l])map[l]=[];map[l].push(x)});Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='nav-group';t.innerText=k;list.appendChild(t);map[k].forEach(x=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='nav-link';a.href=x.postUrl;a.innerText=x.postTitle;list.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(p)}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
